<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Exception; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Attribute\WithHttpStatus; /** * @author Kevin Bond <kevinbond@gmail.com> */ #[WithHttpStatus(403)] final class ExpiredSignedUriException extends SignedUriException { /** * @internal */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('The URI has expired.'); } }
